This is a program in which Uber offers drivers a $4,000 grant to switch from their current vehicle to an EV. These grants are available for both new and used electric vehicl...

feed_items.title: Anzeige: UV-beständige Klemmmarkise für unter 50 Euro bei Amazon
feed_items.description: Eine 1,50 Meter breite Klemmmarkise für Balkon oder Terrasse gibt es bei Amazon zum Aktionspreis. Auch andere Größen sind reduziert. ( Technik/Hardware )

feed_items.title: Journalist Sues FAA Over Drone No Fly Zone Designed to Prevent Filming ICE
feed_items.description: A Minnesota journalist is challenging a 3,000 foot restriction on flying near DHS assets on First Amendment grounds.

feed_items.title: Samsung's new Frame Pro and OLED TVs are now available to order
feed_items.description: After sharing pricing and availability for its new Mini LED TVs in March, Samsung is ready to detail some of the other TVs it introduced at CES earlier this year. feed_items.title: Flipboard's 'social websites' are a new spin on decentralized social media
feed_items.description: Flipboard has been one of the biggest boosters of decentralized social media . Now, the company, which is known for its social news reading app, is rolling out its latest experiment, "social websites."  The project offers publishers and creators an easier path into what's often called the "open s...

feed_items.title: Artemis II crew is just like us, needs help with Microsoft Outlook issues
feed_items.description: The four history-making Artemis II crew members are cooped up with each other in a tiny space for 10 days. And yet the most uncomfortable aspect of the mission might be having to deal with not one, but two instances of Microsoft Outlook . Commander Reid Wiseman sent a literal "Houston, we have a ...

feed_items.title: Artemis II Astronauts Have ‘Two Microsoft Outlooks’ and Neither Work
feed_items.description: In space, no one can hear you scream at Microsoft’s legacy software.

feed_items.title: Anzeige: Magsafe-Handyhalterung jetzt nur rund 10 Euro bei Amazon
feed_items.description: Die Coolpow-Magsafe-Handyhalterung ist für gesetzeskonforme Smartphone-Nutzung im Auto geeignet und jetzt deutlich reduziert erhältlich. ( Technik/Hardware , Android )

feed_items.title: Fraunhofer-Institut: Wasserstoff wird wichtige, aber kleine Rolle spielen
feed_items.description: Fehlende Erzeugungskapazitäten und technische Herausforderungen behindern den Ausbau der Wasserstoffproduktion. Die Entwicklung schreitet dennoch voran. ( Wasserstoff , Brennstoffzelle )

feed_items.title: Anzeige: Bestseller-Saugroboter bei Amazon jetzt zum Bestpreis
feed_items.description: Der beliebteste Saugroboter bei Amazon kommt aus dem Hause Roborock. Jetzt ist er wieder im Angebot und 250 Euro günstiger als die UVP. ( Saugroboter , Roborock )

feed_items.title: Hohe Spritpreise: Grünen-Chef fordert Tempolimit und 9-Euro-Ticket
feed_items.description: Wegen des Irankriegs steigen Benzin- und Dieselpreise auf Rekordhöhe - Felix Banaszak macht Vorschläge für Entlastungen. ( Auto , Politik )

feed_items.title: A Secure Chat App’s Encryption Is So Bad It Is ‘Meaningless’
feed_items.description: TeleGuard is an app downloaded more a million times that markets itself as a secure way to chat. The app uploads users’ private keys to the company’s server, and makes decryption of messages trivial.

feed_items.title: The hottest EVs from the 2026 New York Auto Show (plus one brawny concept)
feed_items.description: With gas prices rising across the country, consumers are turning to electric vehicles as a way to save money on their commute. feed_items.title: Apple Arcade just got two indie gems
feed_items.description: Two fantastic indie titles just dropped for Apple Arcade . The platform has received versions of Dredge and Unpacking , both of which have been optimized for mobile devices. Dredge+ is the complete edition of the game, with all released DLC content. This is pretty much a perfect video game that c...

feed_items.title: Hubble-Teleskop: Der merkwürdige Zerfall des Kometen C/2025 K1
feed_items.description: Eigentlich sollte das Hubble-Weltraumteleskop ein anderes Objekt beobachten - doch dann hat es den Zerfall eines Kometen fast unmittelbar dokumentiert. ( Weltraumteleskop , Astronomie )

feed_items.title: Soundcore Nebula X1 Pro review: The king of party projectors
feed_items.description: Every now and then, I test a gadget so wild that I can’t believe a company actually made it. Soundcore’s $5,000 Nebula X1 Pro projector is the embodiment of that: an ultra bright projector and a 400-watt Dolby Atmos 7.1 speaker system combined in a massive enclosure. feed_items.title: Apple's controversial Fitness VP Jay Blahnik is retiring
feed_items.description: Jay Blahnik, who served as Apple’s Fitness chief for almost 13 years, has announced that he’s retiring this July. According to The New York Times , Blahnik told employees in an email that he was leaving “to spend time with his family and make an exciting move to New York City.” Blahnik is retirin...

feed_items.title: Google's $20 per month AI Pro plan just got a big storage boost
feed_items.description: Google's $20 per month AI Pro plan , which includes Gemini, Veo and Nano Banana, got a big storage boost and some other new perks. Users of the plan (also available for $200 per year ) will see their cloud space jump from 2TB to 5TB at no extra cost. That extra storage can be used not only for AI...

feed_items.title: The Artemis II mission has started its 10-day journey around the moon
feed_items.description: The Artemis II mission successfully launched into space on April 1, at 6:35pm Eastern time, from Launch Complex 39B at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida. It will take NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, as well as Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen, on a 10-d...

feed_items.title: Mr. Resident Evil signs a deal with Mr. Stellar Blade
feed_items.description: Resident Evil legend Shinji Mikami's new studio, Unbound Inc., has been acquired by Shift Up, the company behind Stellar Blade and Goddess of Victory: Nikke . Unbound's unannounced games will be fully supported and distributed by South Korean publisher Shift Up, which is led by CEO Hyung-Tae Kim....

feed_items.title: Scientists Create Plant That Produces Ayahuasca, Shrooms, and Toad Psychedelics All At Once
feed_items.description: The proof-of-concept system produces psilocybin, DMT, and other compounds in leaves of the tobacco plant, potentially easing pressure on wild species and preserving Indigenous traditions.

feed_items.title: What’s going on with Donut Lab's so-called super battery?
feed_items.description: In January, a Finnish-Estonian startup proclaimed it had developed a truly solid state battery, a holy grail for the technology industry. Donut Lab's cell wasn’t just solid state, however. It claimed it was made from cheap and easily available materials, would charge to full in a few minutes and ...

feed_items.description: Sony just revealed a trio of PlayStation Plus Monthly Games for April and it's a pretty stacked lineup. These will all be playable on April 7 for subscribers on any tier. feed_items.title: The United app adds airport security wait times after lines return to normal
feed_items.description: Here's a feature that would've been a lot more useful before this week. Amid recent hours-long airport lines, United is adding security wait times to its app. However, the feature arrives a few days after security lines began returning to normal. Hey, at least it'll be there for the next shutdown...

feed_items.title: SpaceX has reportedly filed for the biggest IPO in history
feed_items.description: SpaceX has reportedly taken the step many onlookers have long expected: filing paperwork to hold an initial public offering (IPO) on the stock market and become a publicly traded company.
